name: Easy Decorative Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat at low speed until ingredients are combined.
3. Beat at high speed until stiff, glossy peaks form when beaters are lifted (about 5 to 7 minutes).
4. Use the icing immediately or cover with plastic wrap or a damp cloth and keep at room temperature for up to 3 hours.
